verdict: PASS — all 5 acceptance criteria verified with hard evidence. All 7 files renamed with git history preserved (R075-R100 similarity scores). All 8 .sh files in hooks/tests/ have mode 100755. No fixed /tmp paths remain in the 3 affected files. Stale comment corrected. test_final_sweep.sh exits 0 with all 27 PASS.

qa.overall_assessment: 7 hooks/tests test scripts renamed from underscore-prefix to test_ convention, permissions corrected to 100755, mktemp+trap added to the 3 files that used fixed /tmp paths, and stale comment fixed. test_final_sweep.sh runs clean. PID guard pattern is not applicable — no background child processes spawned; temp-artifact cleanup pattern is correct and matches the reference file test_push_sentinel_abort.sh.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: test_ac1_verify.sh line 3: TMPDIR_SELF=$(mktemp -d -t ac1-verify-XXXXXX) has no failure guard (no '|| { echo ... >&2; exit 1; }' after the mktemp call). test_final_sweep.sh line 4 does have this guard. The reference file test_push_sentinel_abort.sh uses the same unguarded pattern, so this is not a new regression. Minor robustness gap — if mktemp fails (disk full), the script would continue with TMPDIR_SELF unset and set -u would cause an unbound variable error at line 5. Not blocking.
test_ac5_verify.sh line 3: same unguarded mktemp as test_ac1_verify.sh. Same minor robustness gap. Not blocking.

checks.name: Rename complete — no old underscore-prefix names present
checks.evidence: ls hooks/tests/_*.sh returned 'No such file or directory'. All 7 new test_*.sh files confirmed present: test_ac1_verify.sh, test_ac3_verify.sh, test_ac5_verify.sh, test_ac6_verify.sh, test_ac9_verify.sh, test_ac10_verify.sh, test_final_sweep.sh.

checks.name: Git mode bits set correctly — all 8 .sh files at 100755
checks.evidence: git ls-files -s hooks/tests/*.sh shows all 8 entries at mode 100755: test_ac10_verify.sh (ce58fad), test_ac1_verify.sh (dc83f18), test_ac3_verify.sh (c85d2a4), test_ac5_verify.sh (b08b317), test_ac6_verify.sh (75b5da8), test_ac9_verify.sh (a7b9615), test_final_sweep.sh (619af38), test_push_sentinel_abort.sh (ff72c95). Filesystem permissions confirm -rwxr-xr-x for all 7 renamed files.

checks.name: No fixed /tmp paths in the three affected files
checks.evidence: grep '/tmp/' hooks/tests/test_ac1_verify.sh hooks/tests/test_ac5_verify.sh hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh returned exit 1 (no matches). All 3 files use mktemp-derived variables. Trap lines confirmed: test_ac1_verify.sh line 4 'trap rm -rf "$TMPDIR_SELF" 2>/dev/null EXIT INT TERM'; test_ac5_verify.sh line 4 same pattern; test_final_sweep.sh line 5 same pattern, covering all 3 scratch variables (PUSH_EXEC, PHASE7_PY, STEP7_MD). PID guard N/A: none of these scripts spawn background child processes; the agents/qa.md cleanup contract (PID-guard pattern) applies only to background child process spawning. The temp-dir cleanup trap used here is the correct pattern and matches the reference file test_push_sentinel_abort.sh.

checks.name: Stale comment fixed in test_final_sweep.sh
checks.evidence: grep -n 'invoke each' hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh returned exit 1 (no match — old phrase absent). grep -n 'inline AC checks' hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh returned line 2: '# Final sweep — run inline AC checks and print PASS/FAIL summary.'

codex_consult.feedback_summary: 7 items total for both tasks. For task F specifically: (4) PID guard N/A confirmed — applies to background child processes only, not temp-dir cleanup; (5) rename preservation evidence added via --find-renames showing R075-R100; (6) mktemp failure guard absent in AC1/AC5 scripts — minor, matches reference pattern, non-blocking. No blockers found.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied: (4) PID guard N/A explicitly documented in AC3 evidence; (5) rename-status evidence block added to provenance_check with all 7 R-status entries; (6) mktemp failure edge logged in out_of_scope_observations as non-blocking minor observation.

observations: git mv (history-preserving rename) confirmed via --find-renames R-status: R100 for 5 files, R081 and R089 for the files with mktemp+trap additions, R075 for test_ac1_verify.sh. All above git's default 50% rename detection threshold.

PID guard pattern (agents/qa.md cleanup contract) explicitly does not apply: none of the 3 modified scripts spawn background child processes. The trap 'rm -rf TMPDIR_SELF' EXIT INT TERM pattern is the correct cleanup pattern for temp directory artifacts.
hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py appears in the baseline diff but was not part of this task — it is a separate cycle deliverable.

Minor: test_ac1_verify.sh and test_ac5_verify.sh lack mktemp failure guard (|| error exit). test_final_sweep.sh has this guard. Reference file test_push_sentinel_abort.sh also lacks the guard, so this is consistent with existing convention. Logged as minor out-of-scope observation.
